name: Blender Depth-Guided Img2Img
description: Depth-guided image-to-image generation for Blender scenes. Takes a Blender depth pass and source render, uses ControlNet depth conditioning to regenerate the scene while preserving spatial structure. Ideal for stylizing 3D renders with AI while maintaining geometry.

depth_image.description: Filename of the Blender depth pass render (grayscale depth map)

source_image.description: Filename of the Blender source render to transform

prompt.description: Text description of desired output style or content

negative_prompt.description: Things to avoid in the generation

controlnet_strength.description: Depth ControlNet influence strength (0.0-1.0, higher = stricter depth adherence)

denoise.description: Denoising strength (lower = closer to source render, higher = more creative)

notes.blender_setup: In Blender, enable the Depth pass in View Layer Properties > Passes > Data. Render to EXR or normalize to grayscale PNG for best results.
notes.model_download: Download control_v11f1p_sd15_depth.pth from https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/ControlNet-v1-1 and place in ComfyUI/models/controlnet/
